'''wasomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelcova|zelcova]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelcova|zelcova]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wasomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæsemeth|wæsemeth]] || [[word:wæsemej|wæsemej]] || [[word:wæsemesh|wæsemesh]] || [[word:wæseme|wæseme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasosomoth|wasosomoth]] || [[word:wasosomoj|wasosomoj]] || [[word:wasosomosh|wasosomosh]] || [[word:wasosomo|wasosomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasomoth|wasomoth]] || [[word:wasomoj|wasomoj]] || [[word:wasomosh|wasomosh]] || [[word:wasomo|wasomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasofmoth|wasofmoth]] || [[word:wasofmoj|wasofmoj]] || [[word:wasofmosh|wasofmosh]] || [[word:wasofmof|wasofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wasomotho|wasomotho]] || [[word:wasomojo|wasomojo]] || [[word:wasomosho|wasomosho]] || [[word:wasomoko|wasomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wasomoth|wasomoth]] || [[word:wasomoj|wasomoj]] || [[word:wasomosh|wasomosh]] || [[word:wasomo|wasomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wasomothol|wasomothol]] || [[word:wasomojol|wasomojol]] || [[word:wasomoshol|wasomoshol]] || [[word:wasomokol|wasomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wasomothotho|wasomothotho]] || [[word:wasomojojo|wasomojojo]] || [[word:wasomoshosho|wasomoshosho]] || [[word:wasomoko|wasomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wasomothon|wasomothon]] || [[word:wasomojon|wasomojon]] || [[word:wasomoshon|wasomoshon]] || [[word:wasomokon|wasomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wasomothoro|wasomothoro]] || [[word:wasomojoro|wasomojoro]] || [[word:wasomoshoro|wasomoshoro]] || [[word:wasomokoro|wasomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
